diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Start Pipeline Run Successfully
scenarios.description: Verify that a valid pipeline run request initiates correctly and returns a run_id.
preconditions: API server is running on localhost:8000
scenarios.expected_result: API returns 202 Accepted with a valid UUID run_id and status queued

scenarios.title: Verify Pipeline SSE Status Stream
scenarios.description: Ensure the SSE endpoint streams events for the initiated run_id.
scenarios.expected_result: SSE stream returns PipelineEvents until completion

scenarios.title: Reports List Includes New Run
scenarios.description: Confirm completed run appears in the reports list.
scenarios.expected_result: GET /api/reports returns list containing the new run_id

scenarios.title: Reject Run Request Missing Label
scenarios.description: Validate that missing required fields return 422 error.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns 422 Unprocessable Entity due to missing label

scenarios.title: Handle Invalid JSON Body
scenarios.description: Ensure server handles malformed JSON gracefully.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns 400 Bad Request for malformed JSON

scenarios.title: Process Empty Test Suite
scenarios.description: Verify pipeline handles zero test cases without crashing.

scenarios.title: Reports Endpoint When Directory Missing
scenarios.description: Check behavior when REPORTS_DIR does not exist.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns empty list [] without error

scenarios.title: Concurrent Pipeline Run Requests
scenarios.description: Validate system stability under simultaneous run triggers.
scenarios.expected_result: All requests return unique run_ids and queue successfully

scenarios.title: XSS Payload In Label Field
scenarios.description: Ensure label input is sanitized against script injection.
scenarios.expected_result: Payload is escaped or rejected; no script execution in UI

scenarios.title: Unauthorized Pipeline Start Attempt
scenarios.description: Verify access control prevents unauthenticated runs.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import pytest
import json
import uuid
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect
from playwright.sync_api import APIRequestContext


BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")


# SCENARIO_ID: 97b8f7c9-3862-4f13-a5fe-8f683e90da25
def test_start_pipeline_run_successfully(page: Page):
    """Verify that a valid pipeline run request initiates correctly and returns a run_id."""
    run_pipeline_btn = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    submit_btn = page.get_by_role("button", name="Submit")
    
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/dashboard")
    expect(page).to_have_url(f"{BASE_URL}/dashboard")
    
    run_pipeline_btn.click()
    expect(page.locator(".modal")).to_be_visible()
    
    label_input.fill("Regression Suite v1")
    expect(label_input).to_have_value("Regression Suite v1")
    
    submit_btn.click()
    
    # Verify API response was successful
    expect(page.get_by_role("alert")).to_contain_text("Pipeline run queued")


# SCENARIO_ID: 8db60a6b-3fa1-4494-a95c-3ec145c841f0
def test_verify_pipeline_sse_status_stream(page: Page):
    """Ensure the SSE endpoint streams events for the initiated run_id."""
    run_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/status/{run_id}")
    
    # Wait for SSE connection to be established
    expect(page.locator(".sse-status")).to_contain_text("connected")
    
    # Verify stream receives data
    expect(page.locator(".event-log")).to_contain_text("PipelineEvents")


# SCENARIO_ID: f9d94183-8214-4916-b51d-16b1aee720c2
def test_reports_list_includes_new_run(page: Page):
    """Confirm completed run appears in the reports list."""
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    
    # Verify successful response
    expect(page.locator(".status-code")).to_contain_text("200")
    
    # Verify response body contains run data
    expect(page.locator(".report-list")).not_to_be_empty()
    expect(page.locator(".report-item")).to_contain_text("run_id")


# SCENARIO_ID: 3a73eabb-838f-4bc1-ab01-e7ca11112ce5
def test_reject_run_request_missing_label(page: Page):
    """Validate that missing required fields return 422 error."""
    run_pipeline_btn = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    submit_btn = page.get_by_role("button", name="Submit")
    
    run_pipeline_btn.click()
    expect(page.locator(".modal")).to_be_visible()
    
    # Do not fill label field - submit directly
    submit_btn.click()
    
    # Verify validation error is shown
    expect(page.get_by_role("alert", name="validation error")).to_contain_text("422")
    expect(page.locator(".error-message")).to_contain_text("label")


# SCENARIO_ID: 54d73283-5fe4-430d-9074-d0b2a308196d
def test_handle_invalid_json_body(page: Page):
    """Ensure server handles malformed JSON gracefully."""
    response = page.request.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run",
        data="{invalid json}",
        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    )
    
    # Verify 400 Bad Request status
    expect(response).to_have_status(400)
    
    # Verify error response body
    response_body = response.json()
    assert "detail" in response_body or "error" in response_body


# SCENARIO_ID: 1c5fec02-2aab-4610-bf21-26a6b0c2bb36
def test_process_empty_test_suite(page: Page):
    """Verify pipeline handles zero test cases without crashing."""
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    test_cases_input = page.get_by_placeholder("Test Cases")
    submit_btn = page.get_by_role("button", name="Submit")
    
    label_input.fill("Empty Suite")
    expect(label_input).to_have_value("Empty Suite")
    
    test_cases_input.fill("[]")
    expect(test_cases_input).to_have_value("[]")
    
    submit_btn.click()
    
    # Verify request was sent successfully
    expect(page.get_by_role("alert")).to_contain_text("Pipeline run queued")
    
    # Verify test_count is 0 in response
    expect(page.locator(".test-count")).to_contain_text("0")


# SCENARIO_ID: 38b8fc49-813d-4577-9021-9b20c60b334f
def test_reports_endpoint_when_directory_missing(page: Page):
    """Check behavior when REPORTS_DIR does not exist."""
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    
    # Verify successful response (200)
    expect(page.locator(".status-code")).to_contain_text("200")
    
    # Verify empty list is returned
    expect(page.locator(".report-list")).to_contain_text("[]")
    expect(page.locator(".report-item")).to_have_count(0)


# SCENARIO_ID: 9ad5b4a7-de84-46a2-9efd-0705014fba1a
def test_concurrent_pipeline_run_requests(page: Page):
    """Validate system stability under simultaneous run triggers."""
    # Make multiple parallel requests
    responses = []
    for i in range(3):
        response = page.request.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run",
            json={"label": f"Concurrent Run {i}", "test_cases": []}
        )
        responses.append(response)
    
    # Verify all requests return 202
    for response in responses:
        expect(response).to_have_status(202)
    
    # Verify each response has unique run_id
    run_ids = [r.json().get("run_id") for r in responses]
    assert len(run_ids) == len(set(run_ids)), "All run_ids should be unique"
    
    # Verify all have queued status
    for response in responses:
        expect(response.json().get("status")).to_equal("queued")


# SCENARIO_ID: dab0ed0a-ed16-4268-b622-3bc943479e71
def test_xss_payload_in_label_field(page: Page):
    """Ensure label input is sanitized against script injection."""
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    submit_btn = page.get_by_role("button", name="Submit")
    
    xss_payload = "<script>alert('xss')</script>"
    label_input.fill(xss_payload)
    expect(label_input).to_have_value(xss_payload)
    
    submit_btn.click()
    
    # Navigate to reports to check if payload is escaped
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    
    # Verify payload is escaped or rejected - no script execution
    expect(page.locator(".report-label")).not_to_contain_text("<script>")
    expect(page.locator("body")).not_to_contain_text("alert('xss')")


# SCENARIO_ID: f94da1c2-5926-4ebc-92b9-67c920108854
def test_unauthorized_pipeline_start_attempt(page: Page):
    """Verify access control prevents unauthenticated runs."""
    # Make request without auth token
    response = page.request.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run",
        json={"label": "Test Suite", "test_cases": []},
        headers={}  # No auth header
    )
    
    # Verify 401 Unauthorized status
    expect(response).to_have_status(401)
    
    # Verify error message indicates auth required
    response_body = response.json()
    assert "unauthorized" in str(response_body).lower() or "auth" in str(response_body).lower()
